prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation for TEMPO was performed at the DFT level with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`) using PySCF. The calculation was conducted in the **gas phase** with a specified **multiplicity of 2**. The reported HOMO–LUMO gap is **3.87242 eV**. SCF converged successfully after 12 cycles, and all integrity checks passed without warnings. No solvent effects were included. Geometry was not re-optimized and the input structure was directly sourced from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz.
